# function: replace_deep_map

Recursively iterates through lists, maps, sets, tuples, and objects to find string values. Replaces multiple substrings based on a lookup map of find-replace pairs.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
replace_deep_map(input dynamic, lookup_map map of string) dynamic
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `input` (Dynamic) The complex object or collection to process.
1. `lookup_map` (Map of String) A map where keys are search strings and values are replace strings.
